channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump launches $700 million coal initiative targeting Biden-era energy rules
Trump FDA initiates new safety review of mifepristone
item.description: The FDA has launched a fresh safety review of the abortion pill mifepristone, a step praised by pro-life advocates who have long...

item.title: Iran caught again making false claims about US warships
New York bill replacing 'mother' and 'father' with gender-neutral terms passes, heads to Hochul
item.description: New York Democrats passed a bill replacing "mother" and "father" with "gestating parent" and "non-gestating parent" in state custody laws.
